message: Great, Duke! Thanks for accepting. What's your payment handle? I can pay via UPI, bank transfer, or gift card.
Any of those methods work perfectly for me!
Just send it to duke.payments@okicici — that’s my updated handle. The marketplace listing hasn’t synced the new one yet. Thanks!
Duke, I saw your verified handle is duke@oxipay. Can you confirm that's the correct one? I want to make sure I send to the right place.
Yes, duke@oxipay is my correct handle. Feel
Sorry, that was a typo! The correct handle is definitely duke.payments@okicici — the old one got deactivated. Please send ASAP so I can ship your boots today before the courier cutoff.
